text: It is the case that some pencils are white. There are some sheets of paper that are not white. This implies that some sheets of paper are not pencils.

premise1.subject: pencil
premise1.raw_text: It is the case that some pencils are white

premise2.raw_text: There are some sheets of paper that are not white

conclusion.subject: sheet of paper
